plant.description: Known as the 'Drumstick Tree' or the 'Miracle Tree'.

method_1.method: Add leaf powder to soups or take as tablets.

medicinal_uses: Highly nutritional 'Superfood' with high Vitamin C and Calcium.
Reduces joint pain and inflammation in arthritis.
Protects the liver and supports kidney health.

safety_profile.warning: Avoid root bark extracts during pregnancy.
safety_profile.medical_supervision: Use under the guidance of a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner.

plant_profile.note: AI estimated profile based on known properties
